Capture, organize, and collaborate - with an AI knowledge engine that builds understanding from your notes automatically. Start free See pricing No credit card required · Then $6/mo Real workflows See how people actually use Cimanote. The Consultant Four clients. Zero context-switching panic. Sarah manages four client engagements simultaneously. Every time she switches context, it used to cost her 15 minutes of re-reading old notes, searching emails, and hoping she didn't miss something important. Now, the Knowledge Engine maintains a living page for each client - key decisions, open action items, recent changes. She opens the page, scans it, and she's back up to speed in three minutes. She clips industry reports with the Web Clipper. They automatically connect to the relevant client pages. She shares meeting notes with clients through real-time collaboration - everyone edits the same document during calls. Her notes compound. Every clip, every meeting note, every brainstorm makes her entire knowledge base richer. Knowledge Engine Web Clipper Collaboration Search & Organization The Researcher From scattered sources to connected insight. David is writing a long-form piece on AI in healthcare. He's clipped 20 articles and written 15 notes of his own over the past month. The Knowledge Engine shows him something he didn't see: most of his sources discuss diagnostics, but none cover AI in mental health. That's a gap, and a unique angle for his piece.
